exercises.title: Position in Spherical
exercises.content: A star is 10 light-years from Earth, at azimuth 120°, at elevation 30° above the equator. Write its spherical coordinates.

exercises.title: Spherical vs Systems
exercises.content: For atom, planet orbits, radiation spreading—which system (Cartesian, cylindrical, spherical) fits best?
hints: Planets: orbits are circles, but 3D around sun
Radiation: spreads equally in all directions—spherical!
